'''Keluda''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] spacer who served as a known associate to [[Vilmarh Grahrk]].

==Biography==
During his lifetime, his brother was one of the workers at the [[Golden Nyss Shipyards]] killed when the station was blown up by the [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]]. Keluda also owned a [[Keluda's speeder bike|speeder bike]]. He was acquainted with [[Gar Gastinin]], [[Vletho]], a [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]], and a [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]], with whom he drank with at the [[Cluster]] [[Cantina/Legends|Cantina]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].

He was a member of the [[Assassin's Guild/Legends|Assassin's Guild]], and later tried to get the hit on [[Simon Greyshade/Legends|Simon Greyshade]] after [[Tsian]] was apprehended and the contract was officially open again. When his speeder was destroyed by [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] suspended him in mid-air to question him about the attempted assassination. He told Kenobi [[Venco Autem]] was behind it, tried to kill the Jedi and was subsequently killed when his [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolt was reflected back at him by [[Obi-Wan Kenobi's second lightsaber/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi's lightsaber]] and his dead body fell into the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] cityscape.
